summary.en: Malaysia aligns imported LED product EMC checks with ST and SIRIM recognition pathways, usually requiring traceable test evidence.
summary.zh: 马来西亚对进口 LED 灯具的 EMC 检查以 ST 与 SIRIM 对口为主，通常要求可追溯的测试证据。
summary.zht: 馬來西亞對進口 LED 燈具的 EMC 檢查以 ST 與 SIRIM 對口為主，通常要求可追溯的測試證據。

summary.en: China applies GB/T emission/immunity routes for luminaires and related electrical equipment, which must be converted for Malaysian import review.
summary.zh: 中国对照明和相关电气设备执行 GB/T 电磁兼容路线，通常需要转换为马来西亚审查口径。
summary.zht: 中國對照明和相關電氣設備執行 GB/T 電磁相容路線，通常需要轉換為馬來西亞審查口徑。

gap.en: Expect local mapping work because report templates and acceptance language often differ by authority.
gap.zh: 报告模板和采信语境常与马来西亚口径不同，需先做映射整理。
gap.zht: 報告模板和採信語境常與馬來西亞口徑不同，需先做映射整理。

mandatory_status.target: required for classes under EMC control

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Prepare a clause-by-clause EM interference and immunity mapping between GB/T and Malaysia-facing routes.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 提供 GB/T 与马来西亚 EMC 口径的逐条对照说明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 提供 GB/T 與馬來西亞 EMC 口徑的逐條對照說明。

requirement_topic.zh: 无线功能及 MCMC 审核
requirement_topic.zht: 無線功能及 MCMC 審核

summary.en: Where lighting products include wireless or remote features, Malaysia may require MCMC-related review separate from core electrical approvals.
summary.zh: 灯具包含无线或遥控功能时，马来西亚可能需要 MCMC 路径，与基础电气合规分开处理。
summary.zht: 燈具包含無線或遙控功能時，馬來西亞可能需要 MCMC 路徑，與基礎電氣合規分開處理。

standards_or_laws: MCMC telecom and radio operation rules
Wireless product handling in product import

summary.en: China also applies its own telecom-radio filing process for such functions, which does not automatically satisfy Malaysian MCMC needs.
summary.zh: 中国也对无线功能有独立的通信无线申报流程，但不能自动满足马来西亚 MCMC 要求。
summary.zht: 中國也對無線功能有獨立的通信無線申報流程，但不能自動滿足馬來西亞 MCMC 要求。

standards_or_laws: China telecom and radio management process
Wireless module local filing in China

gap.en: Prepare dual-track compliance if the model contains any wireless capability.
gap.zh: 若产品具备无线能力，需同步准备双轨合规。
gap.zht: 若產品具備無線能力，需同步準備雙軌合規。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Separate telecom review packets early for remote-control and wireless-enabled luminaire SKUs.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对具备远控和无线功能的型号提前制作独立通信审查材料。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對具備遠控和無線功能的型號提前製作獨立通信審查材料。
